_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Direct and oversee privacy specialists and coordinate privacy and data security programs with senior executives globally to ensure consistency across the organization.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing data stewardship programs that assign clear ownership, accountability, and service level agreements for enterprise data domains.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-005 (SP, cosine: 0.525), SP-S-006 (SP, cosine: 0.519).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.430). Shared vocabulary: [data, programs]. DCWF-only terms [across, consistency, coordinate, direct, ensure, executives] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, agreements, assign, clear, designing, domains] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.879, R=0.875). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Direct and oversee privacy specialists and coordinate privacy and data security" and "Skill in designing data stewardship programs that assign clear ownership, accoun" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.540 > STS 0.430 (gap +0.110). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, programs] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.8%. Shared tokens: [data, programs]. DCWF-only: [across, consistency, coordinate, direct, ensure, executives]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, agreements, assign, clear, designing, domains].
